description:
The slug generation process should follow these semantic steps:
1.  Trim any leading or trailing whitespace from the input title.
2.  Convert the entire title string to lowercase.
3.  Replace any sequence of one or more whitespace characters (e.g., spaces, tabs) with a single hyphen.
4.  Remove any characters that are not lowercase ASCII letters (a-z) or hyphens (-).
5.  Replace any sequence of two or more consecutive hyphens with a single hyphen.
6.  If the resulting string is empty after all transformations, return the string 'blocked'. Otherwise, return the processed string.
